description: A vertical announcement graphic combining a White House photo with a text card on a dark navy background. The top half is a photograph in the Oval Office: President Trump seated at the Resolute Desk holding open a signed executive document (showing his signature) toward the camera, flanked by standing officials — a dark-haired woman in a black blazer on the left and an older blonde woman in a cream suit on the right (consistent with Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer) — with U.S. and military flags and red 'MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' caps visible on the desk. Overlaid in large bold white serif capitals is the headline 'HISTORIC EXPANSION.' Below, a white rounded text box (topped by a small DOL seal) contains the body copy: 'The U.S. Department of Labor today released a forecast notice announcing the upcoming availability of $145 million in funding to further expand the national apprenticeship system. The initiative, which represents the most significant investment taken to date in response to President Trump's directive to meet and exceed 1 million active apprentices nationwide, is built on a pay-for-performance model, ensuring taxpayer dollars deliver measurable outcomes.' A small DOL seal anchors the bottom.
notable_text: HISTORIC EXPANSION; $145 million in funding to further expand the national apprenticeship system; 1 million active apprentices nationwide
